title: Dining Out: A Culinary Connoisseur's Chat
opening: Good evening! Welcome to 'The Gilded Spoon'. A pleasure to have you. Have you had a chance to glance at our menu, or might I tempt you with our evening's specials?

t1.prompt: Good evening! Welcome to 'The Gilded Spoon'. A pleasure to have you. Have you had a chance to glance at our menu, or might I tempt you with our evening's specials?
t1.promptTranslation: Good evening! Welcome to 'The Gilded Spoon'. A pleasure to have you. Have you had a chance to glance at our menu, or might I tempt you with our evening's specials? — Good evening! Welcome to our restaurant. It's nice to see you. Have you looked at the menu, or would you like to hear about today's special dishes?

t2.prompt: Splendid! Are you leaning towards anything in particular, or would you like me to walk you through some of our standout dishes this evening?
t2.promptTranslation: Splendid! Are you leaning towards anything in particular, or would you like me to walk you through some of our standout dishes this evening? — Great! Do you have something specific in mind, or would you like me to describe some of our best dishes tonight?

t3.prompt: Certainly. Many patrons rave about our Pan-Seared Scallops with Saffron Risotto – a real symphony of flavours. Alternatively, our Braised Lamb Shank, slow-cooked to perfection, is always a robust choice. What tickles your fancy?
t3.promptTranslation: Certainly. Many patrons rave about our Pan-Seared Scallops with Saffron Risotto – a real symphony of flavours. Alternatively, our Braised Lamb Shank, slow-cooked to perfection, is always a robust choice. What tickles your fancy? — Of course. Many customers highly praise our Pan-Seared Scallops with Saffron Risotto – it's very flavorful. Or, our Braised Lamb Shank, cooked slowly until very tender, is always a strong and popular choice. What sounds good to you?

t4.prompt: Certainly. We have an extensive wine list, artisanal cocktails, and a selection of non-alcoholic refreshments. Anything particular calling to you?
t4.promptTranslation: Certainly. We have an extensive wine list, artisanal cocktails, and a selection of non-alcoholic refreshments. Anything particular calling to you? — Of course. We have a large wine list, handcrafted cocktails, and various non-alcoholic drinks. Is there anything specific you'd like?

t5.prompt: Excellent. Please, let me know your full order and any specific requests, including any beverages. Our kitchen is adept at accommodating.
t5.promptTranslation: Excellent. Please, let me know your full order and any specific requests, including any beverages. Our kitchen is adept at accommodating. — Great. Tell me your complete order and any special requests, even for drinks. Our kitchen is skilled at making adjustments.

t-end-prepare.prompt: Splendid! Your order is in safe hands and will be with you in good time. Is there anything else at all I can get for you right now, or shall I leave you to your bon appétit?
t-end-prepare.promptTranslation: Splendid! Your order is in safe hands and will be with you in good time. Is there anything else at all I can get for you right now, or shall I leave you to your bon appétit? — Great! Your order is being handled well and will arrive soon. Is there anything else I can get for you immediately, or should I leave you to enjoy your meal?

t-repeat.prompt: I'm terribly sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you possibly rephrase or repeat what you said?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: I'm terribly sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you possibly rephrase or repeat what you said? — I apologize, I didn't understand. Can you say it again differently?

t-end.prompt: Perfect. Enjoy your meal and the rest of your evening! It's been a pleasure serving you. We hope to see you again soon.
t-end.promptTranslation: Perfect. Enjoy your meal and the rest of your evening! It's been a pleasure serving you. We hope to see you again soon. — Great. Have a good meal and evening! It was nice helping you. We hope you come back soon.
